name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships
provider: Ministry of Education, Government of India
description: For college & university students who scored above 80th percentile in Class XII. Covers first degree courses up to 3 years, B.Tech/BE up to 4 years.
documents_required: 12th Marksheet, Income Certificate, Aadhaar, Bank Passbook, College Enrollment Letter

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary courses. Covers tuition fees and maintenance allowance.
documents_required: Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Mark Sheets, Aadhaar, Bank Passbook

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
provider: All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE)
description: For girl students pursuing technical education (degree/diploma). One scholarship per family. Covers tuition fee and incidentals.
documents_required: Aadhaar, Income Certificate, Fee Receipt, Bank Passbook, Enrollment Proof

name: National Fellowship and Scholarship for Higher Education of ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students who have passed class XII and seeking admission in graduation/post-graduation in recognized institutions.
documents_required: ST Certificate, Income Certificate, Aadhaar, Class XII Marksheet, Bank Passbook

name: Inspire Scholarship (SHE)
description: Scholarship for Excellence in Science & Technology. For students who scored top 1% in Class XII and pursuing Natural/Basic Sciences at B.Sc/B.S/Integrated M.Sc level.
documents_required: Class XII Marksheet, Merit Certificate, Aadhaar, Bank Passbook

name: Vidyasaarathi Scholarship
description: Multiple scholarships for students from economically weaker sections pursuing professional courses. Several corporate-sponsored schemes available.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Mark Sheets, Aadhaar, Bank Passbook, Enrollment Letter

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Financial assistance to OBC students for pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary education. State-wise implementation.
documents_required: OBC Certificate, Income Certificate, Mark Sheets, Aadhaar, Bank Passbook

name: Reliance Foundation Undergraduate Scholarships
description: For meritorious students from low-income families pursuing UG courses in STEM or Arts/Humanities. Includes academic excellence and leadership modules.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Mark Sheets, Aadhaar, Enrollment Letter, Bank Account

name: HDFC Bank Parivartan's ECS Scholarship
description: For meritorious students from economically disadvantaged families. Covers education costs including tuition, hostel, and other fees.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Mark Sheets, Aadhaar, Fee Structure, Bank Account

name: Google Generation Scholarship (Asia Pacific)
description: Supporting female students in computer science to excel in technology and become leaders.

name: NSP Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minorities
description: For students from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, etc.) studying in Class 1 to 10.
documents_required: Minority Certificate, Income Certificate, Marksheet, Aadhaar

name: ONGC Scholarship for SC/ST Students
description: For SC/ST students pursuing professional courses in Engineering, MBBS, MBA, or Geology.
documents_required: Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Marksheets, Aadhaar

name: Keep India Smiling Foundational Scholarship
description: Open for students enrolled in any recognized engineering degree (B.Tech/B.E). Focus on providing foundational support to meritorious students.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Class 12 Marksheet, Fee Receipt, Aadhaar

name: Samsung Star Scholar Programme
description: Exclusive scholarship for students graduating from Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya (JNV) schools, currently pursuing B.Tech/Dual Degree at NITs/IITs.
documents_required: JNV Certificate, JEE Advanced/Main Rank Card, Income Certificate

name: Cognizant Vidyadhan Scholarship
description: Aimed at supporting exceptionally bright students from economically challenged families who have completed 12th grade and wish to pursue Engineering.

name: Santoor Women's Scholarship
description: Exclusively for young women from AP, Telangana, and Karnataka who have completed 12th from a local government school and are pursuing professional degrees like Engineering.
documents_required: Govt School Pass Certificate, Aadhaar, College ID

name: Nikon Scholarship Program
description: Aimed at empowering students pursuing photography-related courses or professional degree courses including B.Tech. Strong preference for technical innovation.
documents_required: Class 12 Marksheet, Income Certificate, ID Proof

name: JSW UDAAN Scholarship for Engineering
description: Encouraging youth residing near JSW plant locations (and open pan-India) to pursue undergraduate technical education.
documents_required: Domicile Certificate, Income Proof, Admission Letter, Marksheets

name: Mi Scholarship for Higher Education
description: Financial assistance for Class 11, 12, and undergraduate students (including B.Tech) to ensure continuity in education without financial burden.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Previous Year Marksheet, Bank Passbook
